entities.name: GROUNDNUT
entities.description: An important cash crop in the lowland areas of Ethiopia, scientifically known as Arachis hypogaea L.

entities.name: ETHIOPIA
entities.description: The country where the study was conducted, specifically in its lowland areas.

entities.name: ASPERGILLUS SPECIES
entities.description: Fungi that invade groundnut pods and produce aflatoxins.

entities.name: AFLATOXIN CONTAMINATION
entities.description: The presence of aflatoxins in groundnut kernels which compromises their quality.

entities.name: FARM YARD MANURE
entities.description: A soil amendment used to manage Aspergillus species and aflatoxin production.

entities.name: SEED TREATMENTS
entities.description: The application of fungicides or biocontrol agents to seeds before planting to prevent colonization.

entities.name: TRICHODERMA SPECIES
entities.description: Biocontrol agents used to inhibit the growth of Aspergillus species.

entities.name: CARBENDAZIM
entities.description: A fungicide used as a seed treatment to manage Aspergillus.

entities.name: MANCOZEB
entities.description: A fungicide used as a seed treatment to manage Aspergillus.

entities.name: TRICHODERMA HARZIANUM
entities.description: A specific biocontrol fungus used in seed treatment to increase yield and reduce aflatoxins.

entities.name: TRICHODERMA VIRIDE
entities.description: A specific biocontrol fungus used in seed treatment.

entities.name: RANDOMIZED COMPLETE BLOCK DESIGN
entities.description: The experimental design used to lay out the treatment combinations in the study.

entities.name: BABILE HARAMAYA UNIVERSITY SUB-RESEARCH STATION
entities.description: The specific research site where the experiment was conducted.

entities.name: POD YIELD
entities.description: The weight of groundnut pods recovered per hectare.

entities.name: SEED YIELD
entities.description: The weight of groundnut seeds recovered per hectare.

entities.name: ASPERGILLUS FLAVUS
entities.description: A specific species of Aspergillus responsible for high aflatoxin B1 and B2 contamination.

entities.name: AFLATOXIN B1
entities.description: A specific type of aflatoxin produced by Aspergillus flavus.

entities.name: AFLATOXIN B2
entities.description: A specific type of aflatoxin produced by Aspergillus flavus.
